generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor that converts electrical energy (current) into mechanical rotational motion (torque and angular velocity) for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot."
]

instance GearboxActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Mechanical gearbox system (gearwheel + cycloidal gearbox) that transmits and transforms torque/velocity from motor to output shaft with specified gear ratios."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the motor shaft measuring angular position (r_M) for backlash and positional uncertainty reduction."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted behind the gearbox measuring output shaft angular position (r_G) to enable backlash compensation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor input current (I_M) as primary input for torque estimation and dynamics modeling."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance CNCController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller providing reference values (target position, velocity, acceleration) and actual values (measured position, velocity, acceleration) via sensor data streams."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CNCControllerDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance CNCControllerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CNCController
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram describing the structural composition of the first axis (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox) and their interconnections."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance SysMLInternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram instantiating the first axis components (FirstAxis composed of Motor and Gearbox)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance MotorSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model converting input current (I_M) to torque (τ_M) and angular velocity (ω_M) for the permanent magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance GearboxFrictionlessModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Base MATLAB Simulink model representing ideal gearbox behavior without friction (torque/velocity transformations through gear ratios)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model implementing Coulomb-Viscous friction characteristics for the cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction characteristics accounting for boundary lubrication effects."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series motor input current (I_M) measurements streamed via MQTT from CurrentSensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series motor angular position (r_M) measurements from MotorEncoder for backlash compensation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance MeasuredOutputPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series output shaft angular position (r_G) measurements from SecondaryEncoder for positional accuracy analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance MeasuredReferenceValuesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Reference values (target position, velocity, acceleration) and actual values (measured position, velocity, acceleration) from CNCController."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CNCControllerDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlOptimizationEnabler
]

instance DerivedMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor torque (τ_M) values calculated from current measurements and motor dynamics models."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DerivedGearboxTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived gearbox torque (τ_G) values accounting for friction effects from simulation models."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance SimulatedFrictionlessTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque values (τ_out) from frictionless gearbox model for deviation analysis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DeviationAnalysisEnabler
]

instance SimulatedFrictionInclusiveTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque values (τ_out) from friction-inclusive models (Coulomb-Viscous/Stribeck) for accuracy comparison."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DeviationAnalysisEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol implementation for real-time streaming of sensor data (encoder readings, current) from physical components to digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tooling for creating and maintaining structural (BDD) and behavioral (IBD) models of the first axis components."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelVisualizationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink environment for executing multi-physics models of motor dynamics, gearbox behavior, and friction characteristics."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance FrictionAnalysisEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Multi-physics analysis framework combining white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) friction models for characterization."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionCharacterizationService
]

instance ControlOptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Control algorithm optimization engine that refines parameters based on friction model refinements and operational data."
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlParameterUpdateService
]

instance DeviationAnalysisEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Deviation analysis tool comparing simulated (frictionless/friction-inclusive) data against measured data to quantify motion inaccuracies."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviationAnalysisService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard displaying time-series data, model predictions, and friction-related deviations for operational monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time monitoring of sensor data streams (I_M, encoder readings) from physical components via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:provides LiveDataInsight
]

instance ModelVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visual representation of SysML models (BDD/IBD) and their relationships within the first axis structure."
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralInsight
]

instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Multi-physics friction analysis combining measured data with simulation models to quantify static, kinetic, and viscous friction components."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight
]

instance FrictionCharacterizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Quantitative characterization of friction-related inaccuracies (up to 30% of motion errors) in the gearbox system."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionDeviationInsight
]

instance ControlParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of control algorithm parameters based on refined friction models to compensate for wear or temperature effects."
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance DeviationAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated data (frictionless vs. friction-inclusive) against measured data to quantify motion inaccuracies."
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated dashboard displaying time-series data, model predictions, and friction-related deviations for operational monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalMonitoringInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance LiveDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insight into streaming sensor data (I_M, encoder readings) from physical components via MQTT protocol."
]

instance StructuralInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural insight into the first axis composition (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox) through SysML modeling."
]

instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Characterization of static, kinetic, and viscous friction components in the cycloidal gearbox using multi-physics models."
]

instance FrictionDeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantification of friction-related inaccuracies contributing up to 30% of motion errors in the first axis."
]

instance MotionAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantitative analysis of positional accuracy deviations caused by friction effects in the gearbox system."
]

instance OperationalMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of system performance metrics (positional accuracy, torque deviations) for operational decision making."
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of CNC trajectory planning parameters based on refined friction model data to improve motion accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ToolingRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Recommendations for tooling changes or lubrication adjustments based on friction analysis results."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MaintenanceSchedulingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Maintenance scheduling based on performance metrics and anomaly detection (e.g., sudden friction spikes)."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C18: Environment
instance FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorActuator, GearboxActuator, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor, CNCController
]

instance DigitalShadowEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagram, SysMLInternalBlockDiagram, MotorSimulationModel,
               GearboxFrictionlessModel, CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel,
               MeasuredCurrentData, MeasuredMotorPositionData, MeasuredOutputPositionData,
               MeasuredReferenceValuesData, DerivedMotorTorqueData, DerivedGearboxTorqueData,
               SimulatedFrictionlessTorqueData, SimulatedFrictionInclusiveTorqueData
]

// C19: Components
instance FirstAxisComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 robot comprising motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox with working range [-90°, 90°] and max velocity 75°/s."
]

instance FrictionShadowComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized digital shadow focusing on friction analysis of the first axis with modular friction models."
]

// Relationships
instance DataFlow1 : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    DTDFVocab:from MeasuredCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:to SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DataFlow2 : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    DTDFVocab:from MeasuredMotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:to FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance DataFlow3 : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    DTDFVocab:from SimulatedFrictionInclusiveTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:to DeviationAnalysisEnabler
]

instance DataFlow4 : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    DTDFVocab:from FrictionDeviationInsight
    DTDFVocab:to ToolingRecommendationAction
]

instance DataFlow5 : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    DTDFVocab:from MotionAccuracyInsight
    DTDFVocab:to MaintenanceSchedulingAction
]

instance DataFlow6 : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    DTDFVocab:from MeasuredReferenceValuesData
    DTDFVocab:to ControlOptimizationEnabler
]

instance DataFlow7 : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    DTDFVocab:from DerivedGearboxTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:to FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance DataFlow8 : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    DTDFVocab:from SimulatedFrictionlessTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:to DeviationAnalysisEnabler
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates on **real-time and near-real-time scales**:
  - **Data acquisition**: Sensor data (e.g., encoder readings, current) is streamed at **high frequencies** (not explicitly quantified but assumed to align with the robot’s control loop, typically **1–10 kHz** for industrial robots).
  - **Model computation**: Simulation models (MATLAB Simulink) process data traces with **low-latency requirements** to enable real-time friction analysis.
  - **Visualization updates**: Dashboard refreshes dynamically to reflect **live friction deviations**, with updates synchronized to the **operational timeline** of the robot (e.g., machining cycles).
  The DT synchronizes with the PT’s **operational time scale**, ensuring alignment with the robot’s motion control loop."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is organized as a **purpose-specific digital shadow** with the following orchestration:
  1. **Physical Twin (PT)**: The **first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot**, including motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox.
  2. **Data Sources**:
     - **Sensors**: Motor encoder, secondary encoder, current sensor.
     - **Controller**: Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl. (provides reference/actual values).
  3. **Digital Shadow Components**:
     - **Engineering Models**: SysML diagrams describing the axis structure.
     - **Simulation Models**: MATLAB Simulink models for friction and dynamics.
     - **Processing Component**: Executes simulation models to generate friction predictions.
     - **Data Traces**: Measured and simulated data linked to their sources.
  4. **Visualization Layer**: Dashboard integrating all data traces and model outputs.
  The constellation follows a **one-way data flow** (PT → DS) with no feedback to the PT. The DS is **not a full digital twin** but serves as a **foundational baseline** for future DT development."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin (digital shadow) operates during the **operational phase** of the robot’s life cycle, focusing on the **as-operated** representation of the first axis. It does not cover:
  - **As-designed** (idealized models).
  - **As-manufactured** (geometric or assembly deviations).
  Instead, the DS **continuously updates** its models based on **live operational data** to reflect **wear, temperature variations, and tooling changes** over time. The DS is designed for **real-time monitoring and analysis** during active use (e.g., machining tasks)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The DT’s fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Model Accuracy**:
    - **White-box models** (analytical friction models like Coulomb-Viscous) require **parameter tuning** (e.g., load, temperature dependencies).
    - **Black-box models** (data-driven) eliminate parameter identification but may lack physical interpretability.
    - **Multi-physics integration**: Combines white-box and black-box models to balance **physical realism** and **data adaptability**.
  - **Verification and Validation**:
    - **Simulated vs. measured data comparison**: Quantifies deviations to validate friction models.
    - **Uncertainty quantification**: Backlash and positional uncertainty are mitigated by **dual encoder readings** (motor + secondary encoder).
    - **Dynamic calibration**: Models are **continuously updated** during operation to account for wear or environmental changes.
  - **Error Sources**:
    - **Sensor noise** (encoder resolution, current measurement inaccuracies).
    - **Model simplifications** (e.g., idealized gearbox dynamics).
    - **Operational variability** (temperature, load fluctuations).
  The DS does not include **formal uncertainty propagation** but relies on **real-time data-driven corrections**."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the PT and DT involves:
  - **Data Protocols**:
    - **MQTT** for streaming sensor data (e.g., encoder readings, current) from the **Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl. CNC controller** to the DS.
    - **Custom data channels** defined in the **SysML model** to link physical sources (e.g., *I_M* from current sensor) to virtual data traces.
  - **Network Architecture**:
    - **Industrial Ethernet** (assumed, not explicitly stated) for communication between the CNC controller and DS.
    - **Low-latency requirements** to support real-time friction analysis.
  - **Data Format**:
    - **Time-series arrays** of floating-point values (e.g., torque *τ*, angular velocity *ω*) for each data trace.
    - **Metadata** (timestamps, source identifiers) embedded in the DS structure."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed as a **software system** with the following technical aspects:
  - **Execution Environment**:
    - **MATLAB Simulink** runs simulation models (friction, dynamics) on a **local or cloud-based server** (not specified).
    - **Dashboard** likely hosted on a **web-based platform** (e.g., MATLAB Simulink Dashboard or custom web interface).
  - **Storage**:
    - **Data traces** stored in-memory or in a **time-series database** (e.g., InfluxDB, not mentioned but implied for scalability).
    - **Model parameters** and **metadata** stored in the **SysML/AAS framework**.
  - **Scalability**:
    - Designed for **single-axis operation** (first axis of MABI MAX 100).
    - **Modular architecture** allows potential extension to other axes or robots.
  - **Deployment Workflow**:
    1. **Data ingestion**: MQTT streams sensor data to the DS.
    2. **Model processing**: Simulink executes friction/dynamics models.
    3. **Visualization**: Dashboard renders results in real-time."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards and frameworks:
  - **Modeling**:
    - **SysML** (OMG standard) for structural and behavioral modeling of the robot’s first axis.
    - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** (IEC 62421) for semantic integration of models and data.
  - **Simulation**:
    - **MATLAB Simulink** (industry-standard for dynamic systems modeling).
  - **Data Protocols**:
    - **MQTT** (IETF standard) for real-time data streaming.
  - **Digital Shadow Framework**:
    - **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)** (customized from [15, 38]) as the conceptual foundation.
  The DS does not reference **industry-specific DT standards** (e.g., ISO/IEC 23247) but aligns with **MBSE and industrial automation** best practices."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The DT implementation includes the following security and safety considerations:
  - **Data Integrity**:
    - **Traceability mechanisms** ensure data provenance (e.g., linking MQTT sources to simulation models).
    - **Metadata validation** (e.g., timestamps, source identifiers) to prevent tampering.
  - **Operational Safety**:
    - The DS is **passive** (no feedback to the PT), reducing risks of **unintended actuation**.
    - **Safety cell constraints** (working range [-90°, 90°], max speed 75°/s) are enforced by the **Siemens CNC controller**, not the DS.
  - **Cybersecurity**:
    - **MQTT security** (not explicitly detailed) may include **TLS encryption** for data-in-transit (assumed for industrial use).
    - **Access control** for the dashboard (not specified but implied for operational use).
  - **Safety Risks**:
    - **No remote operation** of the PT by the DS, mitigating risks of human injury.
    - **No direct control feedback**, preventing catastrophic failures from DT errors.
  The DS focuses on **monitoring and analysis**, not control, thus inherently limiting safety risks."
]
